description:
Implement the agentic part of `/bw adopt`.

Scope:
- inject a focused prompt that teaches the model how to decompose a plan into issues, epics, and dependencies
- have the model reason about sequencing, dependency edges, and safe parallelism
- consider file-surface-area conflicts / worker interference when suggesting decomposition
- materialize the resulting structure through stable beadwork tools/commands instead of bespoke text parsing

Goal: the extension should guide the model to create a useful beadwork graph from a written plan, not parse a pseudo-DSL out of chat history.
title: Use an LLM-guided decomposition flow to turn plans into beadwork graphs
